'''âj-t-k-f''' ('''kajatkefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allatectomize|allatectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allatectomize|allatectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kajatkefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijatkefoko|thijatkefoko]] || [[word:jijatkefoko|jijatkefoko]] || [[word:shijatkefoko|shijatkefoko]] || [[word:kijatkefoko|kijatkefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujatkefoko|thuthujatkefoko]] || [[word:jujujatkefoko|jujujatkefoko]] || [[word:shushujatkefoko|shushujatkefoko]] || [[word:kukujatkefoko|kukujatkefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujatkefoko|thujatkefoko]] || [[word:jujatkefoko|jujatkefoko]] || [[word:shujatkefoko|shujatkefoko]] || [[word:kujatkefoko|kujatkefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujatkefoko|thujatkefoko]] || [[word:jujatkefoko|jujatkefoko]] || [[word:shujatkefoko|shujatkefoko]] || [[word:kujatkefoko|kujatkefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejatkefoko|thejatkefoko]] || [[word:jejatkefoko|jejatkefoko]] || [[word:shejatkefoko|shejatkefoko]] || [[word:kejatkefoko|kejatkefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojatkefoko|thothojatkefoko]] || [[word:jojojatkefoko|jojojatkefoko]] || [[word:shoshojatkefoko|shoshojatkefoko]] || [[word:kokojatkefoko|kokojatkefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojatkefoko|thojatkefoko]] || [[word:jojatkefoko|jojatkefoko]] || [[word:shojatkefoko|shojatkefoko]] || [[word:kojatkefoko|kojatkefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojatkefoko|thojatkefoko]] || [[word:jojatkefoko|jojatkefoko]] || [[word:shojatkefoko|shojatkefoko]] || [[word:kojatkefoko|kojatkefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjatkefoko|thĂŠjatkefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjatkefoko|jĂŠjatkefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjatkefoko|shĂŠjatkefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjatkefoko|kĂŠjatkefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajatkefoko|thathajatkefoko]] || [[word:jajajatkefoko|jajajatkefoko]] || [[word:shashajatkefoko|shashajatkefoko]] || [[word:kakajatkefoko|kakajatkefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajatkefoko|thajatkefoko]] || [[word:jajatkefoko|jajatkefoko]] || [[word:shajatkefoko|shajatkefoko]] || [[word:kajatkefoko|kajatkefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajatkefoko|thajatkefoko]] || [[word:jajatkefoko|jajatkefoko]] || [[word:shajatkefoko|shajatkefoko]] || [[word:kajatkefoko|kajatkefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajatkefithi|shajatkefithi]] || [[word:shajatkefiji|shajatkefiji]] || [[word:shajatkefishi|shajatkefishi]] || [[word:shajatkefiki|shajatkefiki]]
